title: ASTRANOV ESCALATION — unusable lag + agent blocked on finish

WebGL still expensive despite lite mode (Earth texture, Helper, entity labels, RAF)
Feature surface partially works (locate restored, public copy, truth planets, city DNA) but not shippable product feel

fake planets removed; ISS live only
locate button rescued from hidden app-shortcut-row

Agent has been patch-churning; needs empowered multi-hour rewrite of shell: static HTML + tiny boot + worker/offthread
